summary: Comprehensive testing of EDIMCO CRM 'Big Data / Prospects' feature completed. All 18 requested features tested and verified. Backend APIs 100% functional (14/14 tests passed). Frontend UI fully operational with all CRUD operations, analytics, filters, exports, and i18n support.
passed_tests: Backend CRUD: POST /api/prospects - create a prospect - SUCCESS
Backend CRUD: GET /api/prospects - list all prospects - SUCCESS
Backend CRUD: PUT /api/prospects/{id} - update a prospect - SUCCESS
Backend CRUD: DELETE /api/prospects/{id} - delete a prospect - SUCCESS
Backend Analytics: GET /api/prospects/analytics - returns totals, top cities, top types, budget averages, hot zones - SUCCESS
Backend Export: GET /api/export/prospects/excel - download Excel file - SUCCESS
Backend Export: GET /api/export/prospects/pdf - download PDF file - SUCCESS
Backend Auth: All prospects endpoints require authentication - SUCCESS
Frontend: Prospects page loads at /prospects with table of prospects - SUCCESS
Frontend: 'Prospects' link visible in sidebar navigation with Database icon - SUCCESS
Frontend: Add Prospect dialog opens with all fields (nom, tel, tel2, email, ville, quartier, type_logement, etage, pieces, budget min/max, mode paiement, objectif, situation, source, notes) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Create prospect via form and verify it appears in table - SUCCESS
Frontend: Edit prospect via pencil icon - SUCCESS
Frontend: Delete prospect via trash icon - SUCCESS
Frontend: Toggle Analytics section shows cards (Total Prospects, Cities, Top Type, Avg Budget) and detailed charts (Top Villes, Demand by Type, Hot Zones) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Search filter works (by name, phone, ville) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Filter by ville dropdown works - SUCCESS
Frontend: Filter by type dropdown works - SUCCESS
Frontend: i18n translations exist for prospect-related keys in FR, EN, AR - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: 5 test prospects already exist in MongoDB (Samira Zidane, Youcef Amrane, Fatima Bouras, Karim Djelloul, Ahmed Belkacem)
context_for_next_testing_agent: EDIMCO CRM with full Prospects (Big Data) feature working. Key features: (1) Prospects CRUD at /api/prospects, (2) Analytics at /api/prospects/analytics with totals, top cities, top types, budget averages, hot zones, (3) Excel/PDF exports at /api/export/prospects/excel and /api/export/prospects/pdf, (4) Frontend page at /prospects with table, filters (search, ville, type), analytics toggle, export buttons, (5) Add/Edit dialog with all fields, (6) i18n support for FR/EN/AR. Auth uses Bearer token. Design uses Navy #1E3A5F and Red #C41E3A. Add Prospect button is red (distinctive from clients blue).
